news.title: India's current account deficit to stand at 1.8% of GDP for FY27: Report
news.description: India is expected to see a current account deficit of 1.8 per cent of GDP in FY27 as against around 2 per cent projected earlier. This adjustment follows a stable outturn in the external sector during the preceding fiscal year despite a widening trade deficit.
